verses.text: Tua ciangin siampi Eleazar leh Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel minam beh lutangte kiangah Levi beh lutangte hong pai uh hi

Amaute in Kanaan gamsung Shiloh munah, “Ten'na dingin khuapi leh ka ganhingte uh-a' dingin a lononate tawh kote hong kipiak ding Moses tung tawnin Topa in thu piazo hi,” ci-in amaute kiangah a gen uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' thupiakna tawh Israel mite in amau' luah sung panin Levi mite tungah a nuai-a khuapite leh lonona gamte a pia uh hi
Kohath behte-a' dingin aisan hong tung hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampi Aaron' suanlekhak ahi Levi mite in Judah, Simeon, leh Benjamin minamte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawmlethum ngah uh hi
Tua ciangin a omlai Kohath mite in Efraim minam, Dan minam leh Manasseh minam alangte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawm ngah uh hi
Gershon mite in Issakhar minam, Asher minam, Naftali minam, leh Bashan gamsunga om Manasseh minam alangte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawmlethum ngah uh hi
Merari mite in a beh uh tawh kizui-in Reuben minam, Gad minam, leh Zebulun minamte tung panin khuapi sawmlenih ngah uh hi
Topa in Moses tung tawnin a thupiak bangin hih khuapite leh a lonona gamte Israel mite in aisanna tawh Levi mite tungah a pia uh hi
Judah minam leh Simeon minam sung panin amaute in a nuai-a min kigen khuapite pia uh a
Levi mite ahi Kohath beh sung panin Aaron' suanlekhakte tungah tung hi; amaute tungah a ai kia masa ahih man hi
Amaute in Judah mualtung gam Kiriatharba, Arba pen Anak' pa (Hebron a cihna), a kiima lonona gam tawh amau tungah pia uh hi
Ahih hangin tua khuapi' lote leh a khuaneute pen Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb tungah a neih dingin kipia khin hi
Amaute in siampi Aaron' suanlekhakte tungah mi thatte' bukna khuapi Hebron a lonona gamte tawh, Libnah a lonona gamte tawh
Jattir a lonona gamte tawh, Eshtemoa a lonona gamte tawh
Holon a lonona gamte tawh, Debir a lonona gamte tawh
Ain a lonona gamte tawh, Juttah a lonona gamte tawh, leh Bethshemesh a lonona gamte tawh, hih minam nihte sung panin khuapi kua a pia uh hi
Tua ciangin Benjamin minam panin Gibeon a lonona gamte tawh, Geba a lonona gamte tawh
Anathoth a lonona gamte tawh, leh Almon a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li a pia uh hi
Siampi Aaron' suanlekhakte' khuapite a vekpi-in khuapi sawmthumlethum, a lonona gamte tawh ahi hi
Levi mite sung panin Kohath beh ahi a omlai Kohath mite tungah a kipia khuapite pen Efraim minamte-a' sung pan ahi hi
Efraim mualtung gama om khuapite sung panin mi thatte-a' ding Shekhem a lonona gamte tawh, Gezer a lonona gamte tawh
Kibzaim a lonona gamte tawh, leh Bethhoron a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li amaute tungah kipia hi
Tua ciangin Dan minam sung panin Eltekeh a lonona gamte tawh, Gibbethon a lonona gamte tawh
Aijalon a lonona gamte tawh, leh Gathrimmon a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi
Tua ciangin Manasseh minam alangte sung panin Taanak a lonona gamte tawh, leh Gathrimmon a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi nih kipia hi
Kohath mi a omlai behte' khuapite a vekpi-in a lonona gamte tawh khuapi sawm ahi hi

Tua ciangin Levi beh sunga om Gershon mite tungah Manasseh minam alangte-a' sung panin Bashan gamsunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte-a' dingin bukna khuapi Golan a lonona gamte tawh, leh Beeshterah a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi nih kipia hi
Tua ciangin Issakhar minam sung panin Kishion a lonona gamte tawh, Daberath a lonona gamte tawh
Jarmuth a lonona gamte tawh, leh Engannim a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi
Tua ciangin Asher minam sung panin Mishal a lonona gamte tawh, Abdon a lonona gamte tawh
Helkath a lonona gamte tawh, leh Rehob a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi

Tua ciangin Naftali minam sung panin Galilee gamsunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte-a' dingin bukna khuapi Kedesh a lonona gamte tawh, Hammothdor a lonona gamte tawh, leh Kartan a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi thum kipia hi
Gershon mite beh tuamtuamte' khuapite a vekpi-in a lonona gamte tawh khuapi sawmlethum ahi hi
Tua ciangin Levi mi a omlai Merari behte tungah, Zebulun minam sung panin Jokneam a lonona gamte tawh, Kartan a lonona gamte tawh
Dimnah a lonona gamte tawh, leh Nahalal a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi
Tua ciangin Reuben minam sung panin Bezer a lonona gamte tawh, Jahaz a lonona gamte tawh
Kedemoth a lonona gamte tawh, leh Mefaath a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi
Tua ciangin Gad minam sung panin Gilead gam sunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte-a' ding bukna khuapi Ramoth a lonona gamte tawh, Mahanaim a lonona gamte tawh
Heshbon a lonona gamte tawh, leh Jazer a lonona gamte tawh, a vekpi-in khuapi li kipia hi
Levi beh a omlai ahi Merari beh tuamtuamte-a' ding khuapi a kipia a vekpi-in sawmlenih ahi hi
Israel mite' neihsa lakah Levi mite' khuapi a vekpi-in a lonona gamte tawh khuapi sawmlegiat ahi hi
Hih khuapite in a kiim ciatah lonona gam nei ciat a, hih khuapi khempeuh tua bang ahi hi.
Tua bangin Topa in amau' pulepate tungah piak dingin a kiciam leitang khempeuh Israel tungah pia a, amaute in a ngah khit uh ciangin tua lai-ah a teng uh hi

Tua ciangin a pu a pate uh tungah a ciamsa bangin Topa in amaute tungah na khempeuhah tawlngakna a pia hi. Topa in a galte khempeuh uh amau khutsungah pia ahih manin a galte uh khat beek in zong amaute nang zolo hi
Topa in Israel mite tungah a ciamsa thuhoih khempeuh khat zong a mawkna omlo a, a vekpi-in tangtung kim hi.
